project_area: viable urban communities, decent housing, suitable living environments, economic opportunities for low- and moderate-income persons
eligibility_summary: Eligible activities must meet one of CDBG’s three national objectives: (1) benefit low- and moderate-income persons; (2) aid in the prevention or elimination of slums or blight; or (3) meet other community development needs that present a serious and immediate threat to the health and welfare of the community.
